mission: Build a Next.js 15 SaaS with auth

steps.task:
Decompose this mission into a detailed task list. Quote EXACT requirements from the spec. Do NOT add luxury features.

MISSION: Build a Next.js 15 SaaS with auth

Save the task list to './output/my-saas/project-tasks/tasklist.md'.

Read the task list from './output/my-saas/project-tasks/tasklist.md'. Create technical architecture and UX foundation.

Deliverables:
  1. CSS design system (save to './output/my-saas/css/design-system.css')
  2. Component architecture doc (save to './output/my-saas/project-docs/architecture.md')
  3. Database schema (save to './output/my-saas/project-docs/schema.sql')

MISSION: Build a Next.js 15 SaaS with auth

Review the implementation for security vulnerabilities.
Check './output/my-saas/src/' and './output/my-saas/api/' for OWASP risks, injection flaws, auth issues, and secrets leakage.
Save audit report to './output/my-saas/project-docs/security-audit.md'.

Integrate frontend and backend. Ensure API contracts match.
Test end-to-end flows. Fix any mismatches.
Save integration notes to './output/my-saas/project-docs/integration.md'.

Perform final integration testing on the completed system.
Cross-validate all QA findings with comprehensive automated screenshots.
Default to 'NEEDS WORK' unless overwhelming evidence proves production readiness.

Review all files in './output/my-saas/src/' and './output/my-saas/api/'.
Check './output/my-saas/project-docs/security-audit.md'.
Save final verdict to './output/my-saas/project-docs/VERDICT.md'.
